name: zen-git-memory
description: Git-backed local memory store for Zen sessions, with branch-aware recall and manual capture.

status.description: Show the Git-backed Zen memory store status, branch, and known paths.

remember.description: Save a tagged fact into Zen Git Memory. Usage: [--tag pinned|fallback|normal] <dot.path> <memory text>.

recall.description: Search and recall facts from Zen Git Memory.

tree.description: Show the Zen Git Memory namespace and path tree as a visual schema.
